name: api_keys_create
description: Create a new API key with specific permissions, index restrictions, and optional expiration.

parameters.name: acl
parameters.description: List of permissions (search, browse, addObject, deleteObject, editSettings, listIndexes, deleteIndex, analytics, etc.).

parameters.name: indexes
parameters.description: List of index names this key can access. Empty means all indices.

parameters.name: validity
parameters.description: Validity duration in seconds. 0 means no expiration.

parameters.name: maxHitsPerQuery
parameters.description: Maximum number of hits this key can retrieve per query.
